pillars.title: Legislative Transparency
pillars.summary: Open debates, recorded votes, and public markup sessions for all legislation.

pillars.title: Committee Expertise
pillars.summary: Specialized standing committees with subject-matter authority and subpoena power.

pillars.title: Citizen Initiative Pathway
pillars.summary: Structured process for citizen-proposed legislation with threshold-based Assembly consideration.

pillars.title: Budget Sovereignty
pillars.summary: Assembly controls appropriations, audit authority, and fiscal oversight of all ministries.
